tests.source_program:
define i32 @inttoptr_gep_use() {
bb:
  %inttoptr = inttoptr i64 100 to ptr
  %gep = getelementptr i8, ptr %inttoptr, i64 4
  %load = load i32, ptr %gep, align 4
  ret i32 %load
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary focuses on store usage. This tests inttoptr constant used in GEP chain, which is a different use pattern. The inttoptr may fold but GEP creates a new constant expr.
